text_original: So I bought the year membership last June. The app interface is pretty good, and its definitely gotten easier over the year to filter characters. Even with the various memory upgrades over the past year the bots still forget things way to quickly. Rpg evolved mode ends up being the worst in memory regard, despite it being the most descriptive. I won't be redoing my membership, as unless I micromanage a chat/rp its a mess. But there is potential here if the ai model is changed out or upgraded.
text_zh: 去年六月我买了年度会员。应用界面相当不错，这一年里筛选角色确实变得更方便了。尽管过去一年进行了多次记忆升级，机器人还是忘记得太快。RPG进化模式在记忆方面表现最差，尽管它的描述最详细。我不会续费会员了，因为除非我亲自管理聊天/RP，否则会一团糟。但如果更换或升级AI模型，这里还是有潜力的。
reply_original:
Hi there! Thank you for your honest feedback and for being with us for a year. We truly appreciate your patience as we work on improving memory retention. 

I'm sorry to hear about the frustration with RPG Evolved mode. Could you share specific examples of forgotten details via support@fantachat.ai?
reply_zh:
你好！感谢你真诚的反馈以及一年来的陪伴。我们正在努力改进记忆功能，非常感谢你的耐心等待。

听说你对RPG进化模式感到失望，我对此感到抱歉。能否通过support@fantachat.ai邮箱提供具体遗忘细节的示例？
